name: Wooboard Technologies Limited
summary: Wooboard Technologies Limited develops cloud-based Software-as-a-Service solutions that provides customer loyalty and employee engagement solutions in Australia and internationally. It operates in two segments, REFFIND and WooBoard Software as a Service Products. The company's solutions include loyall, a Blockchain-as-a-Service solution, which transforms the management and delivery of forms of incentives using proprietary blockchain and smart contract technology; and WooBoard, a peer-to-peer employee recognition platform. It serves enterprises, employees, customers, and other supply chain stakeholders. The company was formerly known as REFFIND Ltd and changed its name to Wooboard Technologies Limited in January 2021. Wooboard Technologies Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
